2826.code: throw new RuntimeException("Syntax error at line " + tokens.get(currentTokenIndex).getLine() + ": " + tokens.get(currentTokenIndex).getValue() + " is not " + tokenType);
2826.reason: [This throws an unchecked exception instead of recording a proper syntax error with category code; also, when currentTokenIndex is at EOF, tokens.get(currentTokenIndex) may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This throws an unchecked exception instead of recording a proper syntax error with category code; also, when currentTokenIndex is at EOF, tokens.get(currentTokenIndex) may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [This line may cause an unhandled exception instead of proper error recovery; also, accessing tokens.get(currentTokenIndex - 1) when currentTokenIndex is 0 will cause IndexOutOfBoundsException]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [This throws an unchecked exception instead of reporting a proper syntax error with category code; also, accessing tokens.get(currentTokenIndex - 1) when currentTokenIndex could be 0 leads to IndexOutOfBoundsException]

2048.reason: [This condition is unsafe and logically incorrect: it assumes there are always at least 3 tokens ahead, and uses LPARENT to detect Decl, which is not reliable since LPARENT appears in many contexts. Also, Decl can be empty, so this loop may never terminate or crash on index out of bounds.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: accessing currentTokenIndex+2 may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException and doesn't properly detect Decl boundaries]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition is unsafe and logically incorrect: it assumes there are always at least 3 tokens ahead, and uses LPARENT to detect Decl, which is not reliable since LPARENT appears in many contexts. Also, Decl can be empty, so this loop may never terminate or crash on index out of bounds.]

2052.reason: [This condition is also unsafe: it assumes currentTokenIndex+1 exists, and incorrectly uses MAINTK as the sole terminator for FuncDef. Functions can have complex signatures, and this check doesn't properly identify where FuncDef ends and MainFuncDef begins. The arbitrary "count == 9" break is a hack and will fail on valid programs with more functions.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: accessing currentTokenIndex+1 may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException and doesn't properly detect FuncDef boundaries]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This condition is also unsafe: it assumes currentTokenIndex+1 exists, and incorrectly uses MAINTK as the sole terminator for FuncDef. Functions can have complex signatures, and this check doesn't properly identify where FuncDef ends and MainFuncDef begins. The arbitrary "count == 9" break is a hack and will fail on valid programs with more functions.]

2056.reason: [Arbitrary limit of 9 function definitions is not part of the grammar specification]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Arbitrary limit of 9 function definitions is not part of the grammar specification]

2060.reason: [This manual search resets currentTokenIndex arbitrarily, breaking the parser's sequential token consumption invariant. It may skip tokens or re-parse already consumed ones, leading to inconsistent state.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Manually searching for main function instead of following grammar structure leads to incorrect token index management]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This manual search resets currentTokenIndex arbitrarily, breaking the parser's sequential token consumption invariant. It may skip tokens or re-parse already consumed ones, leading to inconsistent state.]
